ShortDescription.Value: Draw and edit custom buildable land parcels directly on the map.

Publish.LongDescription:
Custom Land Parcel lets you define your own buildable land boundaries directly in the map view.
Features: - Draw and edit custom parcel polygons. - Drag control nodes directly on the map. - Move parcels and vertices from the in-game panel. - Merge parcels into one buildable area. - Customize parcel color, fill opacity, line opacity, and line width per parcel. - Optionally hide vanilla unlocked tile border visuals. - Keeps vanilla construction feedback for out-of-bounds placement.
Beta note: This mod changes city build boundary behavior. Please test on a backup save before using it on an important city.

ChangeLog.Value: Initial beta release with custom parcel drawing, node editing, parcel styling, vanilla border hiding, and build boundary validation.
